title: Inbox signature verification is skipped with no tracking issue reference
description:
server.rs lines 386-389: signature verification on inbound ActivityPub activities is commented out with a 'ponytail:' note explaining it will be added 'in hardening phase'. However, no Beads issue is referenced and there is no tracking item.

As written, any party can send arbitrary Follow or Undo activities to any inbox without proving they control the actor URI. This is a known gap (the comment acknowledges it) but without a tracking reference it risks being forgotten. The note should cite a specific issue ID.
close_reason: P1-P3 fixes: unwrap replaced, INSERT OR IGNORE dedup, X-Real-IP, zeroizing noted, prune wired, strip_suffix, SSRF guard, shared client, dead code removed, issue refs added
